articles.title: Scientists find a way to stop dangerous belly fat as we age
articles.description: Aging doesn’t just add fat—it redistributes it in risky ways, pushing more into the abdomen where it can harm health. Scientists found that testosterone plays a key role in this shift. In older women recovering from hip fractures, a testosterone gel combined with exercise helped prevent the usual rise in dangerous visceral fat. The result could point to a powerful new strategy for improving recovery and long-term health.

articles.title: Woman jailed in Somalia for peaceful protest ‘stripped, kicked and beaten’
articles.description:
In an exclusive interview from prison, Sadia Moalim Ali, a 27-year-old rickshaw driver, tells of her treatment after being arrested for demonstrating against the government
A woman being held in prison in Somalia for taking part in peaceful protests has described how she was tortured by her guards.
Sadia Moalim Ali, 27, told the Guardian she was stripped naked by two male guards in a room monitored by CCTV, kicked, beaten with a baton and left for two days in a small cell without food.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: Scientists accidentally discover DNA that breaks the rules of life
articles.description: A routine experiment with a new single-cell DNA sequencing method turned into a surprising scientific twist when researchers stumbled upon a bizarre genetic code in a microscopic pond organism. Instead of following the near-universal “rules” of life, this newly identified protist rewrites how genes signal their end. This unexpected discovery challenges long-held assumptions about how genetic translation works and hints that nature may be far more flexible—and mysterious—than scientists realized.

articles.title: People once risked everything just to keep their hats on
articles.description: Centuries ago in England, hats weren’t just accessories—they were statements of power and rebellion. Refusing to remove a hat could challenge authority, even in courtrooms and before kings. People valued their hats so deeply that robbery victims sometimes begged to keep them over money. In a world where going bareheaded signaled poverty or madness, hats shaped identity, respect, and even family discipline.

articles.description: Unlike his meeting with the Governor on Wednesday when Mr. Vijay was accompanied only by six newly-elected MLA-designates, on Thursday, a few individuals, who are advising the TVK founder on political and legal matters also accompanied Mr. Vijay to the Lok Bhavan.

articles.title: Meta moves top consumer court against Facebook’s ‘e-commerce platform’ classification
articles.description: Meta Platforms is contesting the consumer regulator classifying Facebook Marketplace as an e-commerce platform. The outcome could redefine regulatory obligations for social media platforms hosting peer-to-peer listings across India.

articles.title: Operation Sindoor signalled no terror sanctuary is safe: Indian Army
articles.description: "Operation Sindoor was not an end, and it was just the beginning," Lt Gen Rajiv Ghai, who played a key role in executing the operation in his capacity as the Army's Director General of Military Operations (DGMO), said.

articles.title: Assembly Elections 2026: Over  ₹1400 crore worth of liquor, freebies, drugs, ‘precious metal’ seized
articles.description: Assembly Elections 2026: More than  ₹1400 crore worth of “illicit inducements” were seized during the Assembly Elections across five states/UT, the Election Commission said.

articles.title: Everyone Should Travel With a Pair of Cheap Wired Headphones (2026)
articles.description: Admit it: It’s inevitable you will forget to charge your Bluetooth pair.

articles.title: Killing of Suvendu's aide: Driver undergoes multiple surgeries, still critical
articles.description: Buddhadeb Bera, who was driving Chandranath Rath's car, sustained bullet injuries and has undergone multiple surgeries, a senior official of the hospital said

articles.title: DMK’s allies urge T.N. Governor to invite TVK chief Vijay to form government
articles.description: “The BJP is using the Governor and taking a stand against the Constitution. That is why the Governor is delaying the opportunity for Mr. Vijay to form the government,” CPI(M) State secretary P. Shanmugam alleged

articles.title: Naidu directs officials to take result-oriented approach, says A.P. inherited ₹9.74 lakh crore in debt

topStories.title: Ex-CJI Chandrachud to mediate between Sunjay Kapur's mother Rani and wife Priya Kapur in trust dispute case
topStories.description: Former Chief Justice DY Chandrachud has been appointed by the Supreme Court to mediate between late Sunjay Kapur's mother Rani Kapur and his wife Priya Kapur in family trust dispute case.

topStories.title: Rubio arrives at Vatican to meet Pope Leo amid Trump attacks
topStories.description: Vatican Secretary of State Cardinal Pietro Parolin says the meeting was requested by the US.

topStories.title: Iran releases video said to show US drone shot down over Hormuz
topStories.description: Iranian media has released video purporting to show the wreckage of a US  drone that was shot down by Iran.

topStories.title: Hormuz To Reopen Soon? US-Iran Reach Agreement To Ease Blockade, Says Report
topStories.description: The coming hours will witness a breakthrough regarding the status of ships stranded in the Strait of Hormuz, said report.

topStories.title: US Yields at 5% Tug Traders Between Dip-Buying Greed and Fear
topStories.description: In some circles on Wall Street, the hottest debate isn’t about a tech-stock bubble or $100 oil as the new norm. It’s whether 30-year Treasury yields will mount a sustained push over 5%.

topStories.title: Rubio faces challenge in Pope Leo meeting after Trump's criticism over Iran
topStories.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio is heading to the Vatican and Italy on a fence-mending visit after President Donald Trump’s broadsides against Pope Leo XIV and the U.S.-Israeli war in Iran have alienated those allies

topStories.title: Keralam CM Race: ‘Congress leaders to abide by high command’s decision', says K Suresh
topStories.description: Speaking to reporters in Thiruvananthapuram after the meeting, Suresh said, "I will obey the decision to be taken by the party high command."

topStories.title: EU weighs restricting use of U.S. cloud platforms to process sensitive government data, sources tell CNBC
topStories.description: There have been increasing calls within Europe for the region's most critical workloads to diversify away from dominant U.S. cloud providers.

topStories.title: Japanese Proverb of the day: ‘If you are in a hurry…’; meaning, business lesson and why it still matters today
topStories.description: The Japanese proverb “If you are in a hurry, go the long way around” offers a timeless lesson on patience, planning and avoiding costly mistakes. In a world obsessed with speed, the saying reminds us that slowing down can often be the fastest path to long-term success.

topStories.title: Lawsuits allege negligence by UPS , others before fiery, fatal November crash
topStories.description: A slew of new civil lawsuits allege UPS and its partners failed their responsibility to make sure a plane they put in the air was safe to fly.

topStories.title: MORNING GLORY: Trump should demand a clear victory over Iran and reject weak compromises
topStories.description: Reports suggest the U.S. and Iran are at their closest point to a deal, but Hugh Hewitt calls the framework terrible and urge Trump to use full leverage.

topStories.title: America’s answer to Iran’s energy threats begins with Alaskan power
topStories.description: President Trump uses the Defense Production Act to expand American energy production, citing national defense and relief for hardworking families.

dailyNews.title: America’s answer to Iran’s energy threats begins with Alaskan power
dailyNews.description: President Trump uses the Defense Production Act to expand American energy production, citing national defense and relief for hardworking families.

dailyNews.title: WILLIAM BENNETT: California's welfare state is a fraud machine. It could make all Americans into victims
dailyNews.description: An estimated $180 billion stolen under Gov. Gavin Newsom exposes how California's welfare policies ignore human nature and incentivize widespread fraud.

dailyNews.title: Democrats see Senate control within reach — but some big hurdles remain
dailyNews.description: The political terrain remains forbidding, but the president’s crumbling approval ratings and the Iran war’s weight on the economy offer the party an opening.

dailyNews.title: Undeterred by polls and courts, Trump honors ballroom donors at White House
dailyNews.description: Amid the war with Iran, surging gas prices and backlash to his immigration policies, the president continues to dedicate extensive time to his signature project.

dailyNews.title: That discount at the pharmacy counter may pack hidden costs
dailyNews.description: The new TrumpRx program relies partly on connecting consumers with discount coupons offered by drugmakers. For insured patients, though, using a coupon can prove dicey.

dailyNews.title: Trump promised cheaper drugs. Some prices dropped. Many others shot up.
dailyNews.description: Since his second term started, President Trump has introduced a flurry of initiatives aimed at taming the excesses of the pharmaceutical industry.

dailyNews.title: Hottest U.S. gas prices in years leave drivers feeling burned
dailyNews.description: Americans on tight budgets are getting hit especially hard by surging fuel costs. forcing some to make hard choices.

dailyNews.title: Federal workers had their annual award show. Many were too afraid to show up.
dailyNews.description: A year after the U.S. DOGE Service dramatically slashed the civil service, government workers are still spooked about getting on the Trump administration’s bad side.

dailyNews.title: Trump pardon recipients face congressional probe over "pay-to-play" questions
dailyNews.description: Congressional Democrats are investigating clemency recipients who may have obtained favorable treatment from Trump or his advisers "through intermediaries, financial contributions, or other forms of influence."

dailyNews.title: Kamala Harris wants the DNC to release its autopsy report of the 2024 campaign
dailyNews.description: Amid turmoil over the party’s future, Kamala Harris has been privately sounding out confidants about her own prospects.

dailyNews.title: Florida surgeon who removed wrong organ says he is ‘forever traumatized’ by patient’s death
dailyNews.description: Thomas Shaknovsky said in a deposition in November that he believed he was removing 70-year-old William Bryan’s spleen, not his liver.

dailyNews.title: Border czar promises 'mass deportations are coming' to fulfill Trump's promises
dailyNews.description: The remarks contrast with Border Czar Tom Homan's softer messaging earlier this year, after two U.S. citizens were killed by immigration officials in Minneapolis.

dailyNews.title: In new poll, Americans voice broad bipartisan support for age caps in Congress
dailyNews.description: The vast majority of Americans — 8 in 10 — say there should be age caps for members of Congress, as well as term limits, according to the latest NPR/PBS News/Marist Poll.

dailyNews.description: Irans hidden blow US suffered far worse damage than Trump admitted

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens Iran strikes, says it's too soon for new direct talks
dailyNews.description: Trump threatens Iran with "higher level" strikes if it won't accept a peace deal, but says it's too soon for direct talks after reporting diplomatic progress.

dailyNews.title: Rubio visits Rome aiming to repair White House ties with Pope Leo
dailyNews.description: Relations between the United States and the Vatican are at a low point over President Trump’s attacks on Pope Leo, who is a leading critic of the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: UFC stars visit Oval Office, thank President Trump for transforming the sport with historic White House fight
dailyNews.description: President Trump welcomed UFC stars to the Oval Office to preview the historic June 14 fight card planned for the White House South Lawn on Flag Day.

dailyNews.title: PHOTOS: Suspect seen pulling gun and allegedly firing toward Secret Service agents near the White House
dailyNews.description: New surveillance images show the moment a suspect allegedly opened fire on Secret Service agents near the White House after Vance's motorcade passed by.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Indiana Victory Shows His Enduring Grip on Core Republican Supporters
dailyNews.description: Low approval ratings? MAGA divisions? The president was able to turn out party loyalists in an Indiana primary to help him oust Republican state lawmakers who had crossed him.

dailyNews.title: Judge Says F.B.I. Can Keep 2020 Election Records Seized From Georgia
dailyNews.description: The ruling is the latest in a saga driven by President Trump’s desire for redemption in the state, which he lost in 2020. The county is likely to appeal.

dailyNews.title: Trump to Host Brazil’s President Lula at White House After Months of Ups and Downs
dailyNews.description: President Trump and President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva, who have had a rocky relationship, will meet on Thursday for talks on security, trade and critical minerals.

dailyNews.title: Jack Smith Calls the Justice Dept. ‘Corrupted’ by Trump and His Allies
dailyNews.description: At a private event in Washington last month, Mr. Smith, the former special counsel, accused Justice Department leaders of targeting people for prosecution to please and impress the president.

dailyNews.title: 5/6: CBS Evening News
dailyNews.description: Health officials work to contain deadly hantavirus outbreak on cruise; President Trump threatens Iran with more attacks if it doesn't agree to a deal.

dailyNews.title: Trump pauses Project Freedom, calls Iran conflict a "skirmish"
dailyNews.description: President Trump touted U.S. actions against Iran on Wednesday. The comments came one day after he paused the Project Freedom initiative to guide ships through the Strait of Hormuz to allow peace negotiations to move forward. CBS News' Holly Williams reports, and Samuel Helfont, an associate professor of strategy and policy at the Naval War College, has more.

dailyNews.title: Todd Blanche says claims of Justice Department politicization are "simply false"
dailyNews.description: Critics have expressed concerns about President Trump's use of the Justice Department, including former President Barack Obama during a taped interview on "The Late Show with Stephen Colbert." CBS News immigration correspondent Camilo Montoya-Galvez sat down for an exclusive interview with acting Attorney General Todd Blanche, who defended the Justice Department's actions.
